description: High priority backend fixes: pagination, request body limits, SQL escaping, rate limiter cap, impersonation cookie, order number race condition, coupon race condition
steps: 1. PAGINATION (server/routes/crm.ts, server/routes/inbox.ts): Add cursor-based pagination to all list endpoints. Accept query params: limit (default 50, max 200) and cursor (opaque string = base64 of createdAt timestamp). For GET /contacts, /deals, /campaigns, /broadcasts, /tasks, /conversations, /conversations/:id/messages. Return { data: [...], next_cursor: string | null }. Use `createdAt < cursorDate` for next page. Follow the existing desc(createdAt) ordering.

2. REQUEST BODY SIZE LIMITS (server/index.ts): Import Hono's bodyLimit middleware from 'hono/body-limit'. Add `app.use('/api/*', bodyLimit({ maxSize: 1024 * 1024 }))` (1MB) before the route mounts. Add 2MB limit specifically for /api/contacts/bulk.

3. SQL WILDCARD ESCAPING (server/routes/admin.ts, server/routes/ai.ts): Create a helper function `escapeSqlLike(str: string): string` in server/utils.ts that escapes %, _, and \ characters. Apply it in: admin.ts GET /api/admin/workspaces where ilike is used with the q parameter, admin.ts GET /api/admin/diagnostics/inspect where ilike is used, and any ilike() call in ai.ts.

4. RATE LIMITER CAP (server/middleware/rateLimit.ts): Add a MAX_BUCKETS constant (100000). In the rate limiter function, before inserting a new bucket, check if buckets.size >= MAX_BUCKETS. If so, delete the oldest 10% of entries (those with earliest resetAt). This is simple LRU-style eviction.

5. IMPERSONATION COOKIE SECURE FLAG (server/routes/admin.ts): In the POST /api/admin/impersonate handler, add '; Secure' to the Set-Cookie value for addisonx_impersonating when NODE_ENV === 'production'. Same for the _hint cookie.

6. ORDER NUMBER RACE CONDITION (server/routes/order.ts): Wrap the nextOrderNumber + insert in a retry loop (up to 3 attempts). The unique index on (owner_id, order_number) will catch races. On conflict (error code 23505 on customer_order_owner_number_idx), retry with a fresh MAX+1.

7. COUPON USAGE RACE CONDITION (server/routes/coupon.ts): In the validateCoupon function, note that actual usage increment happens in site-public.ts or order-payment.ts. Find where usedCount is incremented and replace with an atomic SQL: UPDATE coupon SET used_count = used_count + 1 WHERE id = ? AND (max_uses IS NULL OR used_count < max_uses) RETURNING *. If no row returned, coupon is exhausted.
acceptance_criteria: GET /contacts returns { data: [...], next_cursor: ... } with max 50 items by default
ILIKE queries with % or _ in search terms do not cause wildcard matching
Rate limiter map never exceeds 100,000 entries
addisonx_impersonating cookie includes Secure flag in production
Concurrent order creation for same user does not create duplicate order numbers
Concurrent coupon redemption does not exceed max_uses
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
Run npx vitest run to verify tests pass
